differential_diagnoses: Sickle cell–related acute CNS vaso-occlusive crisis
Metabolic encephalopathy (uremic or secondary to sickle cell nephropathy)
CNS infection (meningitis or encephalitis) in an asplenic patient
next_steps: Strict blood pressure control and monitoring
Perform lumbar puncture to rule out occult infection given asplenic status
Serial monitoring of metabolic profile, including renal function and electrolytes
